mano_cua.result_summary: 暗色模式下代码编辑器活动行高亮为极亮近白色背景，与深色主题严重不协调（应为略浅深色调）。自动补全因WebContainer初始化500错误无法触发，无法验证下拉列表视觉表现。语法高亮和暗色模式切换功能正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Dark mode active line highlight uses near-white background color instead of subtle dark shade. WebContainer failed (500 error) so autocomplete dropdown could not be triggered. Syntax highlighting colors work correctly in dark mode. Left-click consistently triggered right-click context menus causing significant step waste.
